pi_items.source: task.json metadata field; verified against verifier.py which explicitly searches for this table name using regex pattern 'CREATE\s+TABLE\s+(?:PUBLIC\.)?"UnsoldTracksArchive"'

Confirmed via install_libreoffice_base.sh which downloads from https://github.com/lerocha/chinook-database/raw/master/ChinookDatabase/DataSources/Chinook_Sqlite.sqlite and stores at claimed path. Downloaded and analyzed actual database file.

privileged_info_summary: The task 'purge_obsolete_inventory@1' operates on the Chinook database, a real, publicly-available dataset from https://github.com/lerocha/chinook-database containing 3503 tracks, 275 artists, 347 albums, 59 customers, and 412 invoices. The task requires creating an archive table named 'UnsoldTracksArchive' and purging 1519 unsold tracks (tracks with no records in the InvoiceLine table) from the Track and PlaylistTrack tables. The source database is located at /opt/libreoffice_base_samples/Chinook_Sqlite.sqlite and is downloaded during environment setup from the official Chinook repository.
